epc_new.subject: EPC Referral — {{patient_name}} (DOB {{patient_dob}})
epc_new.body:
Dear {{doctor_name}},

Please find attached an EPC referral for {{patient_name}} (DOB: {{patient_dob}}, Medicare: {{medicare_number}} — IRN {{irn}}).

The referral is for physiotherapy services under the Enhanced Primary Care program for {{condition}}.

Please do not hesitate to contact our practice if you have any questions.

Kind regards,
{{sender_name}}
